source_adr: v2 VERIFY ADR-1 (state machine and snapshot); this JSON is the pinned encoding — on divergence the ADR wins

run_transitions.note: supported version + intact chain -> stay (no-op); unsupported version -> BLOCKED(SCHEMA_VERSION); broken chain -> corruption_detected -> FAILED (ADR-5 1.3/1.4)
post-terminal late output for a settled attempt: journaled inadmissible, never accepted (ADR-1 1.6)

attempt_transitions.note: validation-dependent: a node_result COMPLETES only if machine validation of the (journaled) envelope passes; if validation DERIVES an integrity failure the attempt takes N4 node_failed{stale_binding|malformed_output} instead (ADR-2 1.4). The derived N4 is a deterministic consequence of the journaled result, recorded in the transition log.

guards.G_EXEC_SETTLED: every STARTED non-adjudicator attempt settled AND every REQUIRED non-adjudicator node settled or skipped-under-cutoff; optional nodes may remain PENDING
guards.G_CANCEL_FINAL: cancelling flag set AND all attempts settled
guards.G_NO_CUTOFF: forbidden after budget cutoff or cancel flag (ADR-1 I8)
guards.G_RETRY_PERMITTED: prior attempt FAILED with retryable/corrective class AND attempts < max_attempts AND retry reserve > 0 AND remaining wall budget >= own deadline + sum of base deadlines of other pending required nodes
guards.G_WITHIN_DEADLINE: dispatch-to-result duration <= per-kind node deadline (results only; failures/timeouts are journaled as node_failed)
guards.G_ENVELOPE_VALID: machine validation of the result envelope passes (b_binding matches the control-plane claim set, severity level is ladder-derived, etc.); on failure the attempt takes N4 node_failed{stale_binding|malformed_output} not N3 (ADR-2 1.4)
guards.G_PROVEN_NON_ACCEPTANCE: provider reconciliation proves the in-doubt request was never accepted; lands as FAILED(transport_5xx), N7-eligible; unproven in-doubt attempts use N6 node_abandoned instead
guards.G_CUTOFF_ACTIVE: machine-generated only while the budget cutoff flag is set; applies to nodes with zero attempts whose scheduling phase is still open (an optional node whose phase already closed legitimately remains PENDING per R6)
guards.G_CONSOLIDATION_READY: every model-proposed artifact observation has a matching control-plane re-read receipt, OR the cutoff flag releases the hold (the run terminates INCOMPLETE regardless)

event_identity: (event_kind, event_id); conflict hash over canonical body {event_kind, node_id, attempt, payload}
terminal_decision_order: any required node not COMPLETED -> INCOMPLETE
cutoff flag set -> INCOMPLETE (budget exhaustion never COMPLETED, even if in-flight nodes settle successfully)
HEAVY and any adjudicated finding UNVERIFIABLE with candidate_severity.level in {HIGH,CRITICAL} -> INCOMPLETE (V2-SM-08)

evidence_events.claims_reread: control-plane re-read receipt (ADR-2 1.4); allowed in EXECUTING/CONSOLIDATING, phase unchanged; cp- claim-id prefix, snapshot-bound; R7 holds until every model proposal is re-read (cutoff releases the hold)

ledger.domain: the MAIN ledger journals EXTERNAL events (snapshot/plan/exec/node-lifecycle/resume/cancel/budget) + the terminal seal; machine-DERIVED transitions (phase advances, N9 skips, derived N4/terminal) are deterministic consequences reconstructible by replay, recorded in the transition logs, NOT separate ledger records — this keeps an independent head-hash oracle valid
ledger.record: {format_version, seq, prev_hash, kind, event_id, body_digest, artifact_refs[], record_hash}
ledger.artifact_ref: {sha256, size, media_type}; referenced bytes verified against sha256 on read
ledger.record_hash: sha256(canonical({format_version, seq, prev_hash, kind, event_id, body_digest, artifact_refs}))  # artifact_refs INSIDE the hash
ledger.seal: real appended record {kind: terminal_seal, run_id, terminal_seq, head_hash}, created immediately at terminal; a corrupt/unsupported SOURCE journal is NEVER sealed or rewritten
ledger.audit_chain: separate hash-chained post-terminal/recovery trail {seq, prev_hash, kind, digest, record_hash}; holds late_result_rejected + recovery_blocked/recovery_corruption outcomes; NOT the sealed run ledger

guards.G_LEDGER_VERSION_SUPPORTED: journal format_version in supported_versions, else BLOCKED(SCHEMA_VERSION); source not rewritten
guards.G_LEDGER_INTACT: verify_chain() recomputes every record_hash (incl. artifact_refs) + prev_hash links + per-record version, else corruption_detected -> FAILED; source not rewritten

test_only_events.__tamper_ledger__: fault injection for tests ONLY (flip a stored record hash); NOT part of the production vocabulary

release_rules.HEAVY: PROCEED iff terminal=COMPLETED and no adjudicated finding with candidate_severity.level >= HIGH and adjudication in {CONFIRMED,UNRESOLVED,UNVERIFIABLE}; else HOLD
